discovery.run_summary: Risk-on tape with SPY up modestly, VIX collapsing ~9%, and SMH leading on semis strength. SpaceX IPO dominates headlines, dragging 'proxy' names lower as the real deal trades. Semicap equipment names (VECO, ONTO, AEIS) extending sharp multi-day runs without fresh company-specific catalysts, while AVAV diverges sharply lower against a positive tape — likely defense sector pressure tied to Iran deal headlines.

notable_index_moves: SMH +1.7% leading sectors; semicap equipment subgroup extending
XLB +1.87% and XLF +1.37% confirm cyclical bid
ITA -0.95% — defense weak against up tape, consistent with Iran deal proximity headlines

discoveries.name: AeroVironment, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Defense name selling off against risk-on tape on geopolitical de-escalation headline
discoveries.thesis: AVAV's drone-heavy revenue mix is disproportionately exposed to active conflict demand. With Trump admin signaling Iran deal signing 'in coming days' and ITA underperforming, the de-rating could extend if a deal actually prints. No 8-K signal so this is sector/macro driven, not company-specific — but the divergence vs. a risk-on tape is notable.
discoveries.what_confirms: Iran ceasefire actually signed; further ITA weakness; AVAV breaks below recent multi-week support on volume
discoveries.what_kills: Iran deal falls through (Trump-admin source said 'not 100% certain'); AVAV announces a new DoD contract; broader defense bounces as buyers treat dip as opportunity
discoveries.what_to_learn: Drone-pure-play defense names carry higher beta to discrete conflict-resolution headlines than diversified primes — useful to remember when ITA moves on geopolitical news
discoveries.catalyst: Iran deal-signing headline + broader defense weakness (ITA -0.95% on risk-on day)
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: No 8-K; move correlates with ITA underperformance on Iran de-escalation news, and AVAV's drone exposure makes it the most conflict-sensitive name in the group
research_pointers: Check AVAV's most recent backlog disclosure and what % is Ukraine/Middle East tied
Track ITA constituents to see if AVAV's drop is in-line with peers or idiosyncratic
Watch for any pending DoD contract announcements

discoveries.name: Veeco Instruments Inc.
discoveries.setup: Small-cap semicap equipment name extending a sharp multi-day run with no company-specific catalyst
discoveries.thesis: VECO has run ~32% in 5 days with no 8-K, no earnings, and only ~1.4x average volume today. The move appears to be momentum/sympathy with broader semicap strength (SMH +1.7%, ONTO/AEIS also extended). Magnitude on a small-float name without identifiable fundamental catalyst sets up fade risk if the SMH momentum cools.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued absence of company-specific news while SMH stalls; volume thinning on further upside; competitor commentary that doesn't validate the run
discoveries.what_kills: Veeco files an 8-K with a contract win or guidance raise; sell-side upgrade with specific revenue thesis; advanced packaging demand commentary from a primary like AVGO/TSM
discoveries.what_to_learn: Multi-day 30%+ runs in small-cap semicap equipment without 8-K or earnings catalyst are usually sympathy-driven and fade when the leader (SMH) consolidates
discoveries.catalyst: No identified company-specific catalyst; semicap sympathy with SMH leadership
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty {} — no 8-K, no scheduled earnings; move appears purely sympathy/momentum-driven
research_pointers: Check for any HBM/advanced packaging commentary from primes this week that could justify the rerate
Review short interest and float — small float can extend these moves longer than expected
Compare 5-day move to SOX/SMH to gauge how much is beta vs. alpha

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.setup: Mid-cap semicap equipment extending on continued sector strength
discoveries.thesis: ONTO has run ~28% in 5 days alongside VECO and AEIS. Unlike VECO, ONTO has direct advanced packaging/inspection exposure tied to AI-driven HBM demand, which has been a documented bullish theme. Today's move is consistent with sector beta on a strong SMH day. No 8-K, no obvious mispricing direction.
discoveries.catalyst: Semicap sector strength tied to AI/HBM packaging narrative
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals; move tracks sector (SMH) and broader advanced-packaging theme
research_pointers: Compare ONTO's 5-day run to peers KLAC, CAMT — if peers haven't moved similarly, ONTO is extended
Check for any analyst day or conference appearance this week

discoveries.name: Advanced Energy Industries, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Semicap-adjacent name extending on a sector-strong day with same-day 8-K filing of indeterminate content
discoveries.thesis: AEIS filed an 8-K today with items 8.01 (other events) and 9.01 (exhibits). Item 8.01 is a catch-all that could be anything from a press release to a minor disclosure — without reading the exhibit, the content is opaque. The stock is up ~4% today and ~20% in 5 days. Direction of mispricing cannot be determined without knowing the 8.01 content.
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 8.01 is a catch-all event code; cannot infer direction or magnitude without reading the exhibit
research_pointers: Pull the actual 8-K exhibit to see what the 8.01 disclosure covers (guidance update? conference presentation? acquisition?)
Cross-check against any same-day press releases on the IR site
If 8.01 is benign (e.g., investor day deck), treat the 20% 5-day run as semicap sympathy and assess fade risk like VECO

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Iran deal signing reportedly imminent per Trump admin source

secondary_opportunities.relationship: drone defense exposure to active conflict
lower geopolitical risk premium on oil

catalyst_chains.primary_event: SpaceX IPO trading on Nasdaq, +19-25% on debut

trump_signals.post_summary: Endorsement of Julia Letlow for Louisiana Senate, generic America First themes including 'Champion Louisiana Oil & Gas' and 'Unleash American Energy DOMINANCE'
trump_signals.note: Boilerplate energy-dominance language in a campaign endorsement — no specific policy action or company implication. Not market-moving.

ai_announcements.headline: Google sues Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam victims
ai_announcements.summary: Google legal action against 'Outsider Enterprise' which used AI to send 2.5M scam texts. Highlights AI-enabled fraud at scale.

ai_announcements.headline: Jeff Bezos's Prometheus raises $12B at $41B valuation to build 'artificial general engineer' for physical world
ai_announcements.summary: Massive raise for physical-AI startup aiming at heavy engineering and drug design automation.

ai_announcements.headline: Theker raises $85M for reconfigurable factory robots
ai_announcements.summary: General-purpose factory robotics startup, contrast to humanoids like Boston Dynamics.

ai_announcements.headline: Mistral rumored raising €3B at €20B valuation
ai_announcements.summary: European LLM lab nearly doubling valuation.

ai_announcements.headline: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI 'hot IPO summer' commentary (MANGOS)
ai_announcements.summary: Media framing around upcoming IPOs including Anthropic. No concrete announcement, just narrative piece.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Today's AI news flow does not cleanly map to the stocks that moved. The biggest movers (VECO +8.3%, ONTO +6.7%, AEIS +4.1%) are semicap names extending a multi-day run (VECO +32% / ONTO +28% / AEIS +20% over 5 days) — this looks like a sector-wide AI-capex/advanced-packaging trade (HBM, metrology) rather than a reaction to any specific headline in this feed. AVAV -7.1% is a defense/drone name with no obvious tie to today's AI announcements (more likely earnings/guide or defense-sector specific; Prometheus/Theker robotics raises are too early-stage to move a public defense drone name materially). AMR (coking coal) is unrelated to AI. No actionable AI-news-driven mispricing identified in this batch.
